prompt: Prayer for fusion core containment check before battle
prayer:
From the Litany of Atomic Binding, Verse VII

First: Invoke the containment-spirits through the diagnostic auspex, that magnetic chains hold true.
Second: Witness the coolant-flow through sacred ducts, blessed be the heat-exchange.
Third: Seal the core-chamber with the Rite of Confirmation, that no breach manifest.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let fission be bound and fury unleashed.

prompt: Prayer for quality control scanning of manufactured components
prayer:
From the Codex Qualitas, Verse III

First: Attune the measurement-spirit to divine precision, that tolerances be verified.
Second: Pass each part beneath the inspection-eye, recording deviation and perfection alike.
Third: Pronounce judgment upon the manufactured-things, blessing the flawless, marking the imperfect for reclamation.

By the Omnissiah's omniscience, let only worthy work proceed.

prompt: Prayer for air compressor cycling during equipment maintenance
prayer:
From the Pneumatic Offices, Verse II

First: Open the intake-valve to receive the breath of the world.
Second: Engage the piston-heart with the Rite of Compression, building pressure in the sacred vessel.
Third: Release the stored air through the distribution-channels, that machines breathe and function.

May the Machine Spirit sustain this endless cycle.

prompt: Prayer for emergency logic engine error correction
prayer:
From the Codex Logicae Desperatus, Verse IX

First: Invoke the Omnissiah's clarity through the diagnostic-lattice, illuminating corrupted pathways.
Second: Purge false-logic with the Rite of Erasure, burning away deception from the thought-circuits.
Third: Restore true-function through blessed recompilation, that reason flow pure once more.

By force of will and holy algorithm, let order be restored.

prompt: Prayer for consecration of an organ preservation unit after repair
prayer:
From the Litany of Sacred Vessels, Verse VI

First: Cleanse the preservation-chamber with blessed oils and sanctified steam.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within, that it accept the precious cargo entrusted to its care.
Third: Seal the unit with the Rite of Eternal Vigil, binding it to protect life-essence eternal.

May this vessel prove worthy of its burden.

prompt: Prayer for conveyor belt initialization before combat deployment
prayer:
From the Hymnal of Motion, Verse IV

First: Align the belt-spirit upon its sacred rollers, that friction and grip be assured.
Second: Engage the drive-motor with the Rite of Perpetual Turning, commanding endless motion.
Third: Load the cargo-carriers upon the blessed track, that supply flow unbroken to the front.

By the Omnissiah's will, let logistics serve the Emperor's war.

prompt: Prayer for hydraulic press operation during maintenance ritual
prayer:
From the Codex Pressus, Verse VIII

First: Fill the reservoir-heart with blessed fluid, lifeblood of the compression-engine.
Second: Activate the pump-spirit with steady invocation, building pressure in the cylinders' depths.
Third: Guide the press-head downward through the Rite of Controlled Force, crushing and shaping as required.

May precision and power unite in this sacred labor.

prompt: Prayer for surgical servitor sterilization before first use
prayer:
From the Catechism of Purity, Verse V

First: Bathe the servitor-form in blessed cleansing-agents, that all corruption be washed away.
Second: Expose surgical appendages to purifying heat and blessed radiation, sterilizing every tool-edge.
Third: Anoint with sanctified oils and invoke the Machine Spirit, consecrating this vessel for holy work.

Let no infection taint the surgeon's blessed ministrations.

prompt: Prayer for bolter firing rite during regular maintenance
prayer:
From the Litany of Righteous Fury, Verse II

First: Clear the weapon-spirit's spirit-chambers, that no obstruction impede the blessed discharge.
Second: Invoke the firing-pin's readiness through the Rite of Hammer-Blessing, that it strike true and swift.
Third: Test the recoil-spring and trigger-mechanism, blessing each component's function in the Emperor's wrath.

By bolt and flame, may justice find its mark.

prompt: Prayer for electric motor activation during routine startup
prayer:
From the Offices of Electromagnetic Binding, Verse I

First: Verify the power-conduits flow with blessed current, that sufficient strength be gathered.
Second: Engage the rotor-spirit through the Rite of Magnetic Alignment, that poles attract and spin commence.
Third: Monitor the rotation-counter, witnessing the motor's steady acceleration to proper velocity.

May the Machine Spirit turn eternal in dutiful service.
